basic_details.job_title: Assam Rifles General Duty Medical Officer Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for 12 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Assam Rifles General Duty Medical Officer (GDMO) Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of Assam Rifles. A total of 12 vacancies have been announced through the Assam Rifles GDMO Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS with compulsory rotary internship and registered in State/ National Medical Council.
qualification.details: General Duty Medical Officer (GDMO): MBBS, Completed compulsory rotary internship, Registered in State/ National Medical Council.

salary_details.details: General Duty Medical Officers (GDMO): Rs. 75,000/- per month

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for Assam Rifles GDMO recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to attend the walk-in interview for the Assam Rifles General Duty Medical Officer (GDMO) recruitment is 08 June 2026. Candidates should ensure they reach the venue on time.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the GDMO post?
faq.answer: The required educational qualification for the General Duty Medical Officer (GDMO) post is MBBS with compulsory rotary internship and registration with the State/ National Medical Council.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the GDMO post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 12 vacancies available for the General Duty Medical Officer (GDMO) post in the Assam Rifles recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the GDMO position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the General Duty Medical Officer (GDMO) post will receive a salary of Rs. 75,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in. Candidates need to appear directly for the interview with all required documents.

faq.question: Q6. Where will the walk-in interview be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held in Shillong, with the pincode 793010. The exact address and reporting time are detailed in the official notification.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any age limit mentioned for the GDMO post?
faq.answer: The specific age limit details are not provided in the summary. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for any age restrictions or relaxation criteria.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry all original documents, self-attested photocopies of educational qualifications, age proof, experience certificates (if any), and passport-size photographs.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The job type for this recruitment is Contractual, meaning the position is offered on a temporary basis.

faq.question: Q10. What is the selection process for the GDMO recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the General Duty Medical Officer (GDMO) recruitment will be based on a Walk-in Interview.
